summary: Frontend-only verification of the restructured 'Asisten Petugas SE2026' static PWA served at /webapp/index.html via Expo public folder. All static assets return 200. Lock screen bypass technique (route-block google apps script + localStorage seed) worked as expected. Both confirmed bug fixes (Belanja RT Tahunan calc/save, and sign-aware Laba Usaha allocation display) were reproduced and verified WORKING correctly. Regression across Usaha, Belanja RT, Pendapatan, Konverter (Margin/HPP calc exact match: Rp30.000/30.0%/42.9%), Riwayat (export/import buttons present) tabs passed with no functional issues. Service worker reaches 'activated' state and app shell fully renders after simulated offline reload (Mode Offline badge shown). No app-level console errors found; only expected ERR_FAILED (blocked Google Apps Script route) and ERR_INTERNET_DISCONNECTED (during offline simulation) were logged.

issues: Minor UX: clicking '+ Responden Baru' (btn-respondenbaru) resets fields already filled in the same session (e.g. 'Jumlah Usaha Rumah Tangga' selection reverts to 0) if clicked AFTER selecting jumlahUsaha but before it's tied to an active responden. Not a blocking bug, but could confuse testers/users who fill jumlahUsaha then press '+ Responden Baru' expecting it to just confirm rather than reset. Recommend clarifying tooltip/label or auto-detecting no reset needed if form is already empty.

action_items: No blocking issues found. Optional: clarify '+ Responden Baru' button behavior/label since it can silently reset fields set moments earlier (see design_issues).
critical_code_review_comments: app.js BUGFIX comments at line ~1571 and ~3673 correctly reference window._lastTahunanByKey[key] as the source of truth instead of the never-populated window._lastTahunan - verified via live UI test (#pend-belanja-bulan correctly shows Rp 1.000.000 = 12,000,000/12, and 'Simpan Semua' toast confirms 'Tersimpan: ... Tahunan ...').

app.js BUGFIX at line ~3712 (renderLabaUsahaAlokasi ringkasan row) correctly renders sign-aware laba tag (red '−' for loss, green '+' for profit) - verified live: allocating a lossy Usaha 2 (-Rp3.800.000) to anggota Budi shows '− Laba Usaha Rp 3.800.000' in #c0392b, and subtotal correctly nets to Rp 1.200.000 (5,000,000 upah - 3,800,000 loss).

sw.js precache strategy (cache-first for app shell, network bypass for Apps Script calls) works correctly - verified SW reaches 'activated' state and full app shell (HTML/CSS/JS/icons) renders after simulated network offline + reload, with visible 'Mode Offline' badge.

All 9 static asset paths (manifest.json, sw.js, styles.min.css, app.min.js, lock.min.js, pwa.min.js, html2canvas.min.js, icons) return HTTP 200 confirming build.sh output is correctly deployed to /app/frontend/public/webapp/.

No broken onclick bindings detected despite obfuscation of lock.min.js/pwa.min.js and minification of app.min.js - inline onclick handlers (tab switching, add/remove items, hitung buttons, simpan semua, allocation selects) all functioned correctly across ~7 tabs tested.

success_rate.backend: N/A - not in scope per testing_type

seed_data_creation: None persisted - test used a fresh browser context per Playwright invocation, so localStorage-based responden/riwayat data did not carry over between test runs (expected/by design, not a bug).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Lock bypass recipe confirmed working: page.route('**/script.google.com/**', abort) + localStorage.setItem('se2026_kode_aktif_v1','ANYVALUE') + reload. Important ordering note for future tests: on Responden tab, fill 'NAMA KELUARGA' input and select '#jumlahUsaha' BEFORE clicking '+Responden Baru' (data-testid=btn-respondenbaru) OR skip clicking that button entirely if starting fresh (it's only needed to explicitly confirm/reset a new responden context) - clicking it after already selecting jumlahUsaha resets the form back to 0. '#jumlahUsaha' select lives on Responden tab (not Usaha tab) and drives inner Usaha 1..N tabs via renderUsahaTabs(). Usaha calc default 'Responden menyebut omzet per' = 'Hari', so filling #omzet_1 fills a daily figure not monthly - be mindful of magnitude when asserting expected profit/loss values.
rca_of_issue: No unresolved bugs found in this pass; both previously-reported calculation bugs (Belanja RT Tahunan / signed Laba Usaha display) are confirmed fixed in the live deployed build.
